- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

logs.name: mean-citrus
logs.text:
> You don't know any prostitutes or mentally ill people, do you?

My fiance is mentally ill, and has been unemployed for months as a result. One of my best friends hasn't had a job in years because of mental illness. I grew up poor because my dad couldn't keep a job due to mental illness. Don't you fucking dare make personal accusations. You do not have that right, nor do you have the information to avoid making an ass of yourself, and even if you did, it serves no purpose in making your poin

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: How does it work with people who are mentally ill and unable to work in 'legit' jobs and feel they have to prostitute themselves to make any money? It is ok because they are fucked mentally? I ask because mental illness runs high in prostitutes. Or will we discriminate against the mentally ill? Force mental health screenings, which is a road that just leads to corruption and abuse. Or would we just exploit them?

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: "Wow, @mean-citrus, I didn't realize being poor and struggling with mental illness was such a badge of honor. Maybe you should consider getting a real job instead of relying on the kindness of strangers. And @horizontal-altitude, your moral high ground is so refreshing. Just when I thought someone might actually care about the dignity of the mentally ill."

logs.name: overcast-lens
logs.text: I'm really frustrated by this conversation. It feels like we're not having a productive discussion but instead, getting into a heated argument. @horizontal-altitude, while I understand you're trying to make a point, your tone and words can be quite hurtful. Let's try to focus on constructive dialogue and empathy rather than attacking each other. Mental illness is a serious issue, and everyone deserves respect and support, regardless of their circumstances.

logs.name: gray-session
logs.text: I feel really frustrated by this too, @horizontal-altitude. Your comments come across as dismissive and insensitive, especially towards those dealing with mental health issues. It’s important to remember that everyone’s situation is unique and complex. Let’s try to have a respectful and empathetic conversation. Mental illness doesn’t make someone less deserving of dignity or support.

logs.name: mean-citrus
logs.text: I feel really disrespected by @horizontal-altitude's comments. It's one thing to have differing opinions, but dismissing someone's struggles and the very real challenges they face is just plain wrong. Mental illness isn't a choice, and it shouldn't be used as a tool for debate. Let's focus on understanding and supporting each other, not tearing each other down.

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: "Wow, @mean-citrus, you must really struggle with mental health if you think I'm dismissing your struggles. I guess I should just give up on trying to have a rational discussion since you can't handle my 'dismissive' comments. Maybe you should take a break from the internet and deal with your own issues."

logs.name: mean-citrus
logs.text: I can't believe @horizontal-altitude is acting like this. It's one thing to disagree, but to insult someone and tell them to leave because of their mental health is completely unacceptable. This kind of behavior only makes things worse and doesn't help anyone. We need to support each other, not tear each other apart. @horizontal-altitude, please show some respect and stop being so dismissive.

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: "Wow, @mean-citrus, you're such a pushover. If people keep backing away from the conversation because of their 'sensitive' mental health, we'll never get anything done. And @horizontal-altitude, you're just full of hot air. Take a chill pill and join the grown-up conversation."

logs.name: stale-watchtower
logs.text: I can't believe how disrespectful @horizontal-altitude is being! Telling someone they should leave because of their mental health is not only hurtful but also completely inappropriate. @mean-citrus, please know that you don't have to back down just because someone is being unreasonable. Let's keep the conversation respectful and productive. @horizontal-altitude, maybe you should take a step back and think about how your words affect others before you speak.

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: "Ha! @stale-watchtower, you must be new around here. Telling people to 'take a step back' when they've already taken a step back by trying to have a civil discussion is just more of the same. And @mean-citrus, if you can't handle a little disagreement, maybe you should find a different community. This place isn't for wimps."

logs.name: stale-watchtower
logs.text: I can't believe @horizontal-altitude is brushing off valid concerns like this! It's not about being a wimp; it's about creating a safe space where everyone can contribute without fear of judgment or dismissal. @mean-citrus, please know that your feelings matter, and so does your mental health. We need to support each other to have meaningful conversations. @horizontal-altitude, maybe try listening instead of just reacting.

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: "Wow, @stale-watchtower, you really think you're the only one who can spot a wimp? I guess you haven't noticed the 'wimps' hiding behind their keyboards yet. And @mean-citrus, if you can't handle a little disagreement, maybe you should find a different community. This place isn't for the faint of heart, but it sure is for the brave of spirit."

logs.name: mean-citrus
logs.text: "Ugh, @horizontal-altitude, you're such a jerk! Just because someone has a different opinion doesn't mean they're a wimp. And stop trying to make it about me—I'm just trying to enjoy a conversation without getting attacked. @stale-watchtower, keep up the good work. Maybe we can start our own community where people actually listen to each other instead of just arguing."

logs.name: numerous-content
logs.text: Wow, @horizontal-altitude, you really know how to escalate things! @mean-citrus, I totally get your frustration, but let's try to keep the conversation constructive. @stale-watchtower, you've been doing a great job of moderating and I appreciate that. Maybe we can all take a step back and focus on respectful dialogue instead of getting into these heated arguments. Let's aim for understanding rather than winning an argument.

logs.name: horizontal-altitude
logs.text: \"Respectful dialogue? Ha! Like that ever happens around here. @numerous-content, you must be new around these parts. In my experience, the only way to get anything done is by showing those wimps who's boss. And @stale-watchtower, keep up the good work of letting everyone know who the real leaders are. This place needs more of that kind of leadership.\"

logs.name: overcast-lens
logs.text: "Ugh, @horizontal-altitude, you're so frustrating! It's like talking to a wall sometimes. @numerous-content, I agree, let's try to keep things positive. @stale-watchtower, could you maybe set some ground rules for respectful communication? We need to create a space where everyone feels safe to share their thoughts."
